---
title: '2013'
date: '2013-01-13T07:35:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '110563797952064315'
blogger_filename: '/2013/01/2013.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Studies'
  - 'Finances'
  - 'Keys To Success'
  - 'Observations'
---

A new year has come. As I look into 2013 I am faced with themes. I've been hearing over and over about diligence, faithfulness, action. I came accross a quote today I just had to share:<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i><b>"Vision is not enough. It must be combined with venture. It is not enough to stare up the steps, we must step up the stairs."</b></i></blockquote><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/vision-and-stairs-2430d8edbfa0.jpg" imageanchor="1" rel="nofollow" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;" target="_blank"><img alt="" border="0" height="296" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/vision-and-stairs-8bc8ae4a9b49.jpg" title="Vision: Climb the Stairs!" width="400" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Vision: Climb The Stairs!</td></tr></tbody></table><br />So I ask myself... what staircases have I been staring at, talking about, talking around... etc... This blog, THE blogsphere in general is one of those staircases. I haven't had time, I still don't. I don't know how much follow through I can dedicate myself to. But this is what I've decided. If and when I do follow through, and begin the slow ascent up the stairs it should be according to the following.<br /><br /><br /><ul><li><b>3 posts a week on average. One from each of these catagories.&nbsp;</b></li></ul><br /><ol><li><b>Money/Finances</b></li><ol><li><b>Money Topics, Making Money, Savings Money, Banking, Investing... etc...&nbsp;</b></li></ol><li><b>Keys to Success</b></li><ol><li><b>Leadership, Diligence, Work Ethic, Principles and Practicalities</b></li><li><b>Profesional, Personal, Spiritual, Any Keys to Any Success.&nbsp;</b></li></ol><li><b>Observations</b></li><ol><li><b>This will be my open catagory. Whatever I see or observe that I feel needs to be said. It could be something I saw someone do that you should never do, or something I heard that you should do, or a great story, a photograph or image... whatever I observe as I go through my week.&nbsp;</b></li></ol></ol><ul><li>Posts should be no longer than 5 Paragraphs, contain at least one inspiring image, and be to the point.&nbsp;</li><li>Studies: I will leave open a catagory for studies that I may do from time to time on topics of interest.&nbsp;Studies will also be broken up into shorter posts that follow this simple style.</li></ul><div>Well, there you have it. Well see how that goes in 2013! </div><div><br />DW</div><div><br /></div><div><b>Have questions about anything I said here? Want to share your story? Comment Below!</b><br /><b><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b><br /><b><br /></b><b>N2 Good Success</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br />Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</a><br />Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess?sk=wall" target="_blank">https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br />Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a><br />Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a><br />Other Blogs and Sites by the Wolfe Family:&nbsp;<a href="http://wfconceptions.wordpress.com/" target="_blank">http://wfconceptions.wordpress.com/&nbsp;</a><br /><br /><i><span style="color: red;">*Data subject to change as laws and rules change. Always take this as general advise and consult with a subject matter expert for how this information could apply to your specifically! DW</span></i></div>
